annotations.description: defines the ingress related annotations, consumed mostly by the ingress controller

labels.description: can be used to define labels which will be applied to the global HTTP ingress resource.

url.description: configures the URL to reach an external Keycloak. The "host" field supports templating (e.g., {{ .Release.Namespace }}).

protocol.description: defines the protocol used for Keycloak URL (e.g., https).

host.description: defines the hostname for Keycloak. Supports templating (e.g., {{ .Release.Namespace }}).

camundaHub.description: auth configuration alias for Camunda Hub; overrides the legacy console and webModeler auth sections when set.

multiregion.description: Multi-region configuration for the Orchestration cluster. WARNING: get your configuration reviewed by Camunda before going to production — see https://docs.camunda.io/docs/self-managed/concepts/multi-region/dual-region/.

regions.description: Number of regions this Camunda Platform instance is stretched across.

regionId.description: Unique id of the region. MUST start at 0 for the computation to work correctly. With 2 regions, you would have region 0 and 1.

testDeprecationFlags.description: internal flags used by chart tests to assert deprecation behavior.

existingSecretsMustBeSet.description: give error or warning when existingSecret is not set.

labels.description: labels added to the Gateway and all Route resources.

annotations.description: annotations added to the Gateway and all Route resources.

valueFrom.description: Source for the environment variable's value (Kubernetes EnvVarSource).

fieldRef.description: Selects a field of the pod (supports metadata.name, metadata.namespace, metadata.uid, metadata.labels['<KEY>'], metadata.annotations['<KEY>'], spec.nodeName, spec.serviceAccountName, status.hostIP, status.podIP, status.podIPs).

resourceFieldRef.description: Selects a resource of the container (only resources limits and requests are currently supported).

configMapKeyRef.description: Selects a key of a ConfigMap.

secretKeyRef.description: Selects a key of a Secret.

logging.description: configuration for the Connectors logging, included directly in the connectors configuration YAML file.

appProtocols.description: can be used to set the Kubernetes Service appProtocol hint per port (server), e.g. {server: "http"}. Empty by default, no behavior change. See https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/services-networking/service/#application-protocol

replicas.description: (DEPRECATED) can be used to specify the number of replicas for the legacy Zeebe Elasticsearch and OpenSearch exporter indices. Defaults to orchestration.index.replicas.

annotations.description: defines the ingress related annotations, consumed mostly by the ingress controller

labels.description: can be used to define labels which will be applied to the gRPC ingress resource.

annotations.description: can be used to define annotations, which will be applied to the service
can be used to define annotations, which will be applied to the headless service

appProtocols.description: can be used to set the Kubernetes Service appProtocol hint per port (management, http, internal, command, grpc), e.g. {grpc: "kubernetes.io/h2c"}. Empty by default, no behavior change. See https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/services-networking/service/#application-protocol

affinity.description: if specified, the pod's scheduling constraints. See https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/assign-pod-node/#affinity-and-anti-affinity.

profiles.description: defines which components of the orchestration cluster are enabled (e.g., broker, admin, operate).

logging.description: configuration for the restapi logging, included directly in the webModeler restapi configuration YAML file.

appProtocols.description: can be used to set the Kubernetes Service appProtocol hint per port (http, http-management), e.g. {http: "http"}. Empty by default, no behavior change. See https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/services-networking/service/#application-protocol

can be used to set the Kubernetes Service appProtocol hint per port (http), e.g. {http: "kubernetes.io/ws"}. Empty by default, no behavior change. See https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/services-networking/service/#application-protocol

deploymentStrategy.description: update strategy for the restapi Deployment. Defaults to RollingUpdate, which is always safe because the default chart-managed persistence path uses a per-pod ephemeral volume (no concurrent-attach contention). Set to "Recreate" only when using existingClaim with a ReadWriteOnce volume that cannot tolerate concurrent attach during a rollout (introduces brief downtime per upgrade).

webModeler.description: override values for the WebModeler sub-component when using Camunda Hub; takes precedence over the legacy top-level webModeler.* values.

console.description: override values for the Console sub-component when using Camunda Hub; takes precedence over the legacy top-level console.* values.
